status: RESOLVED - 44 quarters of London vs UK premium data now in macro_trend.json
requirement: Prime Central London vs Greater London premium/discount history (2010-2026)

sources_used.source: Bank of England Table 15 — Quarterly average house prices
sources_used.data: Quarterly London and UK average house prices, Q1 2015 – Q4 2025

notes: This data tracks London vs UK national average — not prime vs mainstream London.
For true 'prime premium' (PCL vs Greater London), would need Knight Frank or Savills index.
The London vs UK premium shows London premium erosion post-2016 and recovery post-COVID.
Savills Prime London Q4 2025 data is JS-rendered (not extractable from static HTML).
recommendation: DAT-181 is RESOLVED for London vs UK national premium. True prime premium requires Savills/Knight Frank research subscription.
